commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes `resolveChannelGroupPolicy` so explicit `groupPolicy: "open"` treats `groups` entries as overrides, adds resolver tests, and updates Groups/security docs plus a changelog entry.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +59, Docs +2. Total +67 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for source-level reproduction: current main sets `allowlistEnabled` true whenever `groups` is nonempty, so the reported explicit-open config rejects unlisted groups. I did not run tests because this was a read-only review, but the PR body includes before/after resolver output for the same path.
commands.review_followup: A narrow mechanical repair remains: align the remaining group-allowlist docs with the new explicit-open semantics and refresh the dirty branch before maintainers evaluate the access-control change.

target.title: fix(channels): keep groupPolicy=open loose when groups dict has per-group overrides
target.author: voicewitness
